work_unit: SCRIPTS-L04 real fix: distill-patterns.py subprocess.run narrow except (combined with pending L01 in same worktree)
situation: audit-2026-07-03-012 SCRIPTS-L04 was blocked: worktree opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 had mis-targeted load_json_robust narrowing (already on main via case-2026-07-03-082 reconciliation note, but actually NOT on main — only L01 verify-pattern sys.argv fix lived there unmerged). action: Applied narrow-except fix directly into blocking worktree opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 (line 361: except Exception → except (SubprocessError,OSError,TimeoutError)). Force-push succeeded to origin. grep -n confirms line 361 now reads 'except (subprocess.SubprocessError, OSError, TimeoutError) as e:'. Main working tree reverted to original bare-except state (no dirty files). Worktree ready for human merge; merging will close both SCRIPTS-L01 and SCRIPTS-L04.
next_suggestion: Human: review + merge opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 (covers L01+L04). After merge, update audit-cycle-state derived_fixes SCRIPTS-L04 status→merged; then all 6 findings from audit-2026-07-03-012 will be merged → status=cycle-complete → next ralph round triggers new full audit on unaudited project.

audit_findings.finding: bare 'except Exception' at subprocess.run dispatch catches KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit/MemoryError, silently converting them to llm_status strings. Already flagged as SCRIPTS-L04 in audit-2026-07-03-012; this case applies the fix.
audit_findings.remediation: Narrow to (subprocess.SubprocessError, OSError, TimeoutError). SubprocessError covers CalledProcessError+TimeoutExpired base; OSError covers env failures; TimeoutError covers stdlib timeout. Lets fatal signals propagate.
